title: begonia princeps
intro: Begonia princeps, also known as Begonia grandis or Begonia princeps subsp. grandis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is an endangered, evergreen perennial native to Borneo, characterized by large, elliptic leaves and reddish-brown stems. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The leaves and stems of Begonia princeps have been used in traditional medicine for their health benefits, which include reducing fever and relieving pain, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
